name: Mandarin Almond Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small skillet, melt 3 tablespoons sugar over low heat.
2. Add almonds and stir until coated. Allow to cool.
3. Break the almonds into small pieces and set aside.
4. In a jar with a tight-fitting lid, combine oil, vinegar, parsley, salt, pepper, hot pepper sauce, and remaining sugar. Shake well.
5. Just before serving, combine lettuce, oranges, onion, and almonds in a large salad bowl.
6. Shake dressing; pour over salad and toss.
